blended.narrative: Kimberley Alpine Resort is expecting flurries over the next 48 hours with trace amounts. Snow levels around 3,592 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 11 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Thursday: 3.5" of snow, highs of 38°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Saturday: 3.1" of snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
